response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:00: Identified performance of '愛♡スクリーム!' featuring Nekomata Okayu, Houshou Marine, and Tsunomaki Watame. Lyrics not publicly available, transcribed chorus from audio. 2. 02:00-02:03: Transition scene. 3. 02:03-04:30: Identified performance of 'ダーリン' (Darling) by MARETU, featuring Nekomata Okayu and Ninomae Ina'nis. Searched for official lyrics for 'ダーリン' by MARETU, which were found on Moegirl.
response.global_summary: The video features a live concert performance by VTubers, including Nekomata Okayu, performing two songs: 'Ai ♡ Scream!' and 'Darling' by MARETU.

scenes.description: The video begins with three VTubers performing '愛♡スクリーム!' (Ai ♡ Scream!). They are on a moving stage, waving to the audience.
scenes.performer_in_video: Nekomata Okayu, Houshou Marine, Tsunomaki Watame
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
愛♡スクリーム!
叫びましょう
スクリーム!
愛♡スクリーム!
(Repeat)

scenes.description: Brief transition period between the two songs with a stage reset.
The VTubers Nekomata Okayu and Ina perform the song 'ダーリン' (Darling) by MARETU.

魔法みたいな
夢みたいな
待って、そんなの聞いてないってば!
根本的に
痛い異常行動
本能的に
深い破壊衝動を
"わからないことだらけ"を
言えない
消えない思い込め
"愛の強制ミューティレーション!"
魔法みたいな
夢みたいな
世界に感染! 不快に蔓延!

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Like magic,
Like a dream,
Wait, I didn't hear about that!
Fundamentally,
Painful abnormal behavior,
Instinctively,
Reflecting deep destructive impulses
"Everything I don't understand"
Can't say,
Won't disappear, thoughts trapped inside
"Love's forced mutilation!"
Like magic,
Like a dream,
Infecting the world!
Spreading in discomfort!
Wait, I didn't hear about that, Darling?
A better love,
A faulty development
Because, that would be boring, wouldn't it...
